revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap |_template=Maplink |_alias-map=1:zoom,lat:frame-lat,2:frame-lat,long:frame-long,3:frame-long,4:id,5:from,6:raw | frame = yes | frame-width = 290 | frame-height = 240 | frame-align = center | plain = yes | type = line | stroke-width = 2 | stroke-color = #cc0000 }}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>
